allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; titles=[t for t in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if 'medal' in t['name'].lower\(\) or 'allied' in t['name'].lower\(\)]; print\(json.dumps\([{'id':t['id'],'name':t['name']} for t in titles], indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); v=d.get\('title',{}\); print\('processingState:', v.get\('processingState'\)\); print\('packageId:', v.get\('id'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['versions'][0]; print\('processingState:', v['processingState']\); print\('normalizedAssetRootPath:', v['normalizedAssetRootPath']\); print\('installScriptPath:', v['installScriptPath']\)")
